description: Algorithmic description (computational pipeline, FLOP counts, memory usage, and output logs) were not included in the original finding. To address this, a step-by-step specification of input generation, continued fraction expansion loop bounds, conditional checks, FLOP per step, and GPU resource utilization is required. Also missing are the full output files for all (k, N) pairs up to 10^11. This would require (re-)documenting the computational kernel and uploading full output and logs.
action_taken: Finding already has Method section (line 156), timing table (lines 158-171), exception set counts (lines 124-134), and HF dataset reference.
